description: C1 bootstrap node mode switch (coverage-widening, hermetic): drive l3_set_setting bootstrapNodeMode and prove it round-trips through l3_dump_state.bootstrapNodeMode (auto->manual->auto). bootstrapNodeMode is a GLOBAL Prefs enum {auto,manual,lan} read by the startup bootstrap path. Uses EXACT-value polling (state_equals) so the mid-state is checked precisely (codex P2). Soft precondition (starts 'auto', the seeded default) catches a dirty fixture; ends restored to 'auto' so the fixture self-cleans even if interrupted. Hermetic — no echo peer, no DHT round-trip (this asserts the SETTING, not live bootstrap behavior, which is the network leg of S82). Maps to feature C1.
